subject: Re: DA today
body:
no look for something to match the table chrome 


----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffrey E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, February 26, 2007 1:52:54 AM
Subject: DA today


DID YOU KNOW...?     
You can easily fly into the city ( East 34th St. heliport ) from JFK or Newark by a helicopter shuttle.. They only started doing this from midtown on Feb 5th this year.. 
" At US Helicopter, our regularly scheduled flights will travel from Manhattan to JFK and Newark in just 8 minutes. We fly every half hour, from 7 in the morning to 7 at night.
A quicker way to and from the airport also means a faster trip through security. That’s because we check your bags and clear you through security at the heliport. A place where there’s never more than a handful of people. So when you arrive at the airport, we can take you straight to your gate when departing from AA Terminal 9 at JFK or Continental Terminal C at Newark. " ..they didn't mention private plane connections ;-)
 
169 $  one way / one person
There are 8 seats / flight
They do not operate on weekends or holidays.
 
 
 
PS: Should I get these dining chairs for 10F ? http://www.dwr.com/productdetail.cfm?id=2456 
 
Love you


TV dinner still cooling?
